emails.subject: Various Outstanding Documents
emails.body: Various Outstanding Documents gerald, i have a couple of questions for you: 1) susan scott told me that she would get back to you with some of the nits that she had on the hubbard document. i am waiting for the final comments from dushinske, but they should come today. i would like to get everything signed today because we want to make sure that we can book the gas at these high prices. 2) vector term sheet. i seem to have deleted my copy of the most recent draft we had circulating. can you send me your most recent update, please? if i hear anything from dushinske, i will let you know, thanks, jamie

emails.subject: Various Outstanding Documents
emails.body: Various Outstanding Documents gerald, i have a couple of questions for you: 1) susan scott told me that she would get back to you with some of the nits that she had on the hubbard document. i am waiting for the final comments from dushinske, but they should come today. i would like to get everything signed today because we want to make sure that we can book the gas at these high prices. 2) vector term sheet. i seem to have deleted my copy of the most recent draft we had circulating. can you send me your most recent update, please? if i hear anything from dushinske, i will let you know, thanks, jamie

emails.subject: Re: Various Outstanding Documents
emails.body: Re: Various Outstanding Documents I talked to Susan last Friday and she gave me her changes which I put into the doc. So I am only waiting on Foti and Dushinske's changes. Attached is the Vector term sheet. Jamie Ginsberg@ENRON 06/19/2000 09:08 AM
